title: citrus amara
intro: Citrus amara, also known as bitter orange, is a species of citrus plant that is native to Asia and the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of limonene, a compound that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of citrus amara include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and aiding in weight loss, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Citrus amara can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
